subject: Cedar & Slate launch readiness follow-up
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Elise, Omar, and Talia,

We will include daily batch inventory sync and daily batch reconciliation for the launch readiness phase. I will confirm the payment token scope with Product by May 22. The executive launch readiness dashboard is targeted for June 5.

We can include a path toward real-time reconciliation once Product signs off, but the written pilot scope will use daily batch language.

Best,
Mira

subject: Re: Cedar & Slate launch readiness follow-up
bodyMarkdown: Thanks Mira. Cedar & Slate will send the POS field map and sandbox credentials by May 24. Please confirm whether payment token handling is included before launch. Omar will keep the Store 014 inventory issue in the support ticket.

subject: Internal note: Cedar payment scope
bodyMarkdown: Internal note: daily batch is implementable; real-time and token handling need Product review before any customer-facing commitment.
